nasb.text: Who stills the roaring of the seas, The roaring of their waves, And the tumult of the peoples.

esv.text: who stills the roaring of the seas, the roaring of their waves, the tumult of the peoples,

cnv.text: 你平息了海洋的洪濤和澎湃的巨浪， 以及萬民的喧嘩。

ccb.text: 又平息怒海狂涛， 止息列邦的喧嚣。

csbs.text: 你平息海洋和其中波涛的喧嚷， 平息万民的喧嚣。
